debug_info.goal:
case neg.refine_3.inr
ι : Type u_1
𝕜 : Type u_2
V : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : DecidableEq ι
inst✝⁴ : Field 𝕜
inst✝³ : LinearOrder 𝕜
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing 𝕜
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝ : Module 𝕜 V
s : Finset ι
x y : ι → V
hs : s.Nontrivial
z : V
c : ι → 𝕜
hc₀ : ∀ i ∈ s, 0 ≤ c i
hc₁ : ∀ i ∈ s, c i ≤ 1
hz : ∀ i ∈ s, (lineMap (y i) (x i)) (c i) = z
i : ι
hi : i ∈ s
hci : c i ≠ 1
hy : ∀ i ∈ s, y i ∈ (convexHull 𝕜) (x '' ↑(s.erase i))
w : ι → 𝕜
hw₀ : ∀ i_1 ∈ s.erase i, 0 ≤ w i_1
hw₁ : ∑ i ∈ s.erase i, w i = 1
hyi : (s.erase i).centerMass w x = y i
j : ι
hj : j ∈ s
hij : i ≠ j
this : (lineMap (y i) (x i)) (c i) = (lineMap (y j) (x j)) (c j)
⊢ ((if i ∈ s ∧ ¬i = j then c i else 0) + ∑ x ∈ s \ {j}, (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x)⁻¹ •
      ∑ x_1 ∈ s \ {j}, (Pi.single i (c i) x_1 + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x_1) • x x_1 =
    y j

failed_attempts:
rw [← this, lineMap_apply, lineMap_apply, ← hyi, centerMass_eq_add_smul_of_mem (s.erase i) (mem_erase.2 ⟨hi, _⟩),
      smul_add, smul_sum, smul_sum, ← sum_add_distrib]
    · simp_rw [Function.update_apply, if_neg (ne_of_mem_erase _).symm, if_neg (ne_of_mem_erase _).symm,
        smul_smul, sub_mul, one_mul, mul_smul, sum_sub_distrib, sum_smul, ← sum_sub_distrib,
        ← sub_smul, sub_self, zero_smul, sum_const_zero, zero_add, add_sub_cancel_left,
        Function.update_apply, if_pos rfl, if_neg hij.symm, sub_self, zero_smul, add_zero,
        Pi.single_apply, if_pos rfl, if_neg hij.symm, add_zero]
      congr! 2 with k hk
      rw [Function.update_apply, if_neg (ne_of_mem_erase hk)]
      split_ifs with hki
      · subst hki; contradiction
      · rfl
    · rwa [sum_erase_eq_sub, hw₁, sub_self]
